insights.reason: Here's what you need to know to clear as Shaco:\n\n* Level 1: Run IMMEDIATELY to  <ScMonsterCampInline camp=\
/> and place a box down ASAP at 0:25, then another at 0:40. You will start at <ScMonsterCampInline camp=\
/>\n* As you do <ScMonsterCampInline camp=\
/>, the boxes will get the Big Raptor down to around 600 HP, and it will walk towards you. <ScSummonerInline summonerIdentifier=\

/> it to get level 2. \n* Then throughout your clears, you can leave camps at 20-30% \\~ HP left with a Box to finish them off. \n* This is why we're putting 2 points in <ScAbilityInline_v2 spellKey=\
/>, so we can speed up our clear leaving camps early with boxes.
insights.title: How to Clear

insights.reason: You ABSOLUTELY need to Backstab someone every time you <ScAbilityInline_v2 spellKey=\
/>.\n\n* Your <ScAbilityInline_v2 spellKey=\
/> guarantees a crit with a 1.6x multiplier. This also buffs your backstab damage for a huge amount of burst on your first auto.\n* If using <ScAbilityInline_v2 spellKey=\
/> over walls to move around the map, you don't need the stealth. Press B immediately to come out of stealth, letting your <ScAbilityInline_v2 spellKey=\
/> come off CD faster.
insights.title: Cancel Stealth, Get Q Back
Hidden broken mechanic
insights.reason: Unironically, what every new Shaco player gets wrong is pressing their <ScAbilityInline_v2 spellKey=\
/> because no one knows what the passive does.\n\n* Your <ScAbilityInline_v2 spellKey=\
/> while off cooldown gives all your auto attacks a slow effect for 2 seconds. This is why <ScRuneInline runeIdentifier=\
/> is OP.\n* This also applies to your Clone. So as long as your <ScAbilityInline_v2 spellKey=\
/> is up and your Clone is hitting someone, they are slowed, just tanking it, which is BROKEN combined with our earlier <ScRuneInline runeIdentifier=\
/> tip, since the clone is just going bananas on them.\n* Only use <ScAbilityInline_v2 spellKey=\
/> to finish kills. Your <ScAbilityInline_v2 spellKey=\
/> also benefits from your passive backstab, so it's better to <ScAbilityInline_v2 spellKey=\
/> as they try to get away at low HP.

approach-velocity.insight: Shaco has a permanent slow on his E, which means he can have 100% up-time from Approach Velocity.\n\n* Your clone can trigger it too. So even if you're not in range, if your clone is hitting them, it helps you catch up with the extra move-speed.

hail-of-blades.insight: Shaco deals extra damage when striking enemies from the back. Hail of Blades pairs perfectly with his passive, to stealth in and try to burst with 3 super quick autos before they react and turn around.\n\n* The omega OP tech for <ScRuneInline runeIdentifier=\
/> is to come out of stealth with a Q auto, activating Hail of Blades. Then press <ScAbilityInline_v2 spellKey=\
/>. Your clone will keep Hail of Blades' attack speed buff for the <span className=\
>entire duration it's out. If players ignore the clone, it will solo them with this buff.
